description:
Index NOTES type names; it never resolves them. Two halves, one index-time walk, one commit.

DEFINE -- define_scope mints TypeName(module,name,arity) for each @type and holds its body AST, the same cheap note-what-is-here that already mints fn and module ids. Add NamespaceSymbol::Type(TypeName).

REFERENCE -- walk every type-position in the indexed surface (@spec args and returns, param annotations, extern bodies, @type bodies, x-is-T tests) and call reference_type(module,name,arity), mirroring reference_function: mint the identity and record it as an upstream dep of the consumer it feeds (the function whose contract or body names it). This recorded reference set IS that consumer later wait-set. Nothing resolves here; no type-algebra.

Retain top-level @type the way modules already do: finish_code_index (source.rs:58) drops program.attrs while modules keep theirs (source.rs:492) -- make GLOBAL uniform.

Verify: namespace_test extended for Type; a @type becomes a referenceable identity with its body held; a @spec naming Foo.t records Foo.t as a dep of that function with nothing resolved.
title: Note type names: NamespaceSymbol::Type, reference_type, retain top-level @type
